title: DuEls
overview: DuEls is a journey through the Vigeland Museum by Belgian and French choreographer Damien Jalet and Erna Omarsdottir from Iceland, where groundbreaking contemporary dance meets Vigeland's classic sculptures.

trailers.title: Jonas Åkerlund / Damien Jalet & Erna Ómarsdóttir / Nagelhus Schia Productions – DuEls
